item.description: Folarin Balogun's pair of goals led Team USA to a 4-1 win against Paraguay in their World Cup opener at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. Morgan Chesky reports on Team USA's performance and their next match against Australia on June 18 in Seattle.

media:content.media:title: Team USA kicks off World Cup with win over Paraguay
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun's pair of goals led Team USA to a 4-1 win against Paraguay in their World Cup opener at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. Morgan Chesky reports on Team USA's performance and their next match against Australia on June 18 in Seattle.

item.title: Team USA kicks off World Cup with win over Paraguay

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Pochettino, a 54-year-old Argentine, has been on the job for 20 months, but Friday’s game was unquestionably his biggest opportunity to make an impression on a wider fanbase tuning in to watch the U.S. for the first time.

media:content.media:text: USA v Paraguay: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Mauricio Pochettino, head coach of the U.S. men, speaks to the media after the team's victory Friday.

item.title: Coaching the U.S. was a big test for Mauricio Pochettino. Then his World Cup opener went ‘amazing.’

item.description: As the World Cup gets underway, Tom Llamas speaks with a man who has been part of the World Cup experience for decades, and whose voice people are sure to recognize. This week’s great American is Andrés Cantor.

media:content.media:title: Great Americans: A conversation with Andrés Cantor
media:content.media:description: As the World Cup gets underway, Tom Llamas speaks with a man who has been part of the World Cup experience for decades, and whose voice people are sure to recognize. This week’s great American is Andrés Cantor.

item.title: Great Americans: A conversation with Andrés Cantor

item.description: El delantero recorta dentro del área y de pierna derecha manda el balón al fondo de la portería para marcar el primero de la “Canarinha” sobre los “Leones del Atlas”.

media:content.media:title: Soberbio gol de Vinicius y Brasil lo empata frente a Marruecos
media:content.media:description: El delantero recorta dentro del área y de pierna derecha manda el balón al fondo de la portería para marcar el primero de la “Canarinha” sobre los “Leones del Atlas”.

item.title: Soberbio gol de Vinicius y Brasil lo empata frente a Marruecos

item.description: El delantero define de gran manera por encima de Becker, luego de un pase filtrado y adelantar a los “Leones del Atlas” sobre la “Canarinha”.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Ismael Saibari para abrir el marcador y adelantar a Marruecos frente a Brasil
media:content.media:description: El delantero define de gran manera por encima de Becker, luego de un pase filtrado y adelantar a los “Leones del Atlas” sobre la “Canarinha”.

item.title: Golazo de Ismael Saibari para abrir el marcador y adelantar a Marruecos frente a Brasil

item.description: En la previa de Brasil ante Marruecos, Nuno Gomes, Daniel Angulo, Ximena Cebreros y Luis Baraldi analizan el debut de Carlo Ancelotti y explican por qué la experiencia del técnico italiano podría marcar la diferencia para la Canarinha en el Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Nuno Gomes: “La experiencia de Ancelotti puede hacer la diferencia para Brasil” | Conexión Mundial
media:content.media:description: En la previa de Brasil ante Marruecos, Nuno Gomes, Daniel Angulo, Ximena Cebreros y Luis Baraldi analizan el debut de Carlo Ancelotti y explican por qué la experiencia del técnico italiano podría marcar la diferencia para la Canarinha en el Mundial 2026.

item.title: Nuno Gomes: “La experiencia de Ancelotti puede hacer la diferencia para Brasil” | Conexión Mundial

item.description: Cuando parecía que Suiza se quedaba con la victoria gracias al penal de Embolo, Qatar encontró el empate en los instantes finales por medio de Khoukhi, para sellar un emocionante 1-1 en su debut en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

media:content.media:title: Empate agónico: Qatar rescata un punto ante Suiza en el último minuto.
media:content.media:description: Cuando parecía que Suiza se quedaba con la victoria gracias al penal de Embolo, Qatar encontró el empate en los instantes finales por medio de Khoukhi, para sellar un emocionante 1-1 en su debut en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

item.title: Empate agónico: Qatar rescata un punto ante Suiza en el último minuto.

item.description: Cuando la derrota parecía inevitable, Boualem Khoukhi apareció en el área para conectar un certero cabezazo y marcar el 1-1 en los últimos instantes del partido. Un gol dramático que desató la euforia de Qatar ante Suiza en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

media:content.media:title: Khoukhi de cabeza anota el agónico empate de Qatar ante Suiza en el último suspiro del juego
media:content.media:description: Cuando la derrota parecía inevitable, Boualem Khoukhi apareció en el área para conectar un certero cabezazo y marcar el 1-1 en los últimos instantes del partido. Un gol dramático que desató la euforia de Qatar ante Suiza en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

item.title: Khoukhi de cabeza anota el agónico empate de Qatar ante Suiza en el último suspiro del juego

item.description: El jugador del Real Madrid llegó al vestidor para preparar su partido ante Marruecos en la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Tremendo baile de Vinícius Jr. antes de su debut en el Mundial 2026 con Brasil
media:content.media:description: El jugador del Real Madrid llegó al vestidor para preparar su partido ante Marruecos en la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Tremendo baile de Vinícius Jr. antes de su debut en el Mundial 2026 con Brasil

item.description: El equipo de Carlo Ancelotti está listo para hacer su debut en la Copa del Mundo, aunque lo hará sin la presencia del que es para muchos su mejor futbolista.

media:content.media:title: Neymar desaparece en el vestidor de Brasil: Así lucen todas las camisetas del equipo de Ancelotti
media:content.media:description: El equipo de Carlo Ancelotti está listo para hacer su debut en la Copa del Mundo, aunque lo hará sin la presencia del que es para muchos su mejor futbolista.

item.title: Neymar desaparece en el vestidor de Brasil: Así lucen todas las camisetas del equipo de Ancelotti

item.description: Hakimi y todo el equipo de Marruecos se preparan en este vestidor de primer nivel en New Jersey.

media:content.media:title: Una locura por dentro: Así es el espectacular vestidor de Marruecos en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Hakimi y todo el equipo de Marruecos se preparan en este vestidor de primer nivel en New Jersey.

item.title: Una locura por dentro: Así es el espectacular vestidor de Marruecos en el Mundial 2026

item.description: EL jugador del Paris Saint-Germain y todo Marruecos llegaron a East Rutherford para hacer frente a Brasil.

media:content.media:title: Tremendo look de Hakimi en su llegada para enfrentar a Brasil
media:content.media:description: EL jugador del Paris Saint-Germain y todo Marruecos llegaron a East Rutherford para hacer frente a Brasil.

item.title: Tremendo look de Hakimi en su llegada para enfrentar a Brasil

item.description: Hora antes de su partido, la Selección de Brasil fue despedida por su mascota. Todas las estrellas del equipo de Ancelotti están listas para brillar en la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Raphinha y Vinícius Jr. reciben una despedida muy especial precio a su debut en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Hora antes de su partido, la Selección de Brasil fue despedida por su mascota. Todas las estrellas del equipo de Ancelotti están listas para brillar en la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Raphinha y Vinícius Jr. reciben una despedida muy especial precio a su debut en el Mundial 2026

item.description: A Kennedy Center official told a federal judge Saturday that all references to President Donald Trump inside, outside and online have been removed from the Kennedy Center, in compliance with the court’s extended order requiring their removal by noon.

media:content.media:title: Trump’s name removed from Kennedy Center
media:content.media:description: A Kennedy Center official told a federal judge Saturday that all references to President Donald Trump inside, outside and online have been removed from the Kennedy Center, in compliance with the court’s extended order requiring their removal by noon.

item.title: Trump’s name removed from Kennedy Center

item.description: President Trump announced on Saturday that a peace deal with Iran will be signed on Sunday, and that immediately afterward the Strait of Hormuz will be open. The prime minister of Pakistan said a deal was closer “than ever before.” NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian has the latest.

media:content.media:title: U.S.-Iran deal could be finalized within days, Trump and Iranian officials say
media:content.media:description: President Trump announced on Saturday that a peace deal with Iran will be signed on Sunday, and that immediately afterward the Strait of Hormuz will be open. The prime minister of Pakistan said a deal was closer “than ever before.” NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian has the latest.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal could be finalized within days, Trump and Iranian officials say

item.description: Security preparations were underway on Saturday in San Antonio and New York City ahead of Game 5 between the San Antonio Spurs and New York Knicks. Officials are on alert after fan violence earlier this week outside of New York’s Madison Square Garden. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports.

media:content.media:title: Security ramps up in San Antonio and New York ahead of NBA finals Game 5
media:content.media:description: Security preparations were underway on Saturday in San Antonio and New York City ahead of Game 5 between the San Antonio Spurs and New York Knicks. Officials are on alert after fan violence earlier this week outside of New York’s Madison Square Garden. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports.

item.title: Security ramps up in San Antonio and New York ahead of NBA finals Game 5

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.dc:creator: Amina Kilpatrick
item.description: For 53 years, Knicks fans have endured heartbreak, bad luck and countless “maybe next years.” Now, with New York one game away from its first NBA championship, many fans aren’t taking any chances.

media:content.media:text: Madison Square Garden Subway Station is decorated in the orange and blue colors of the New York Knicks.
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks-themed 34th Street Penn Station subway entrance in Manhattan last week.

media:content.media:text: Madison Square Garden Subway Station is decorated in the orange and blue colors of the New York Knicks.
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks-themed 34th Street Penn Station subway entrance in Manhattan last week.

media:content.media:text: Madison Square Garden Subway Station is decorated in the orange and blue colors of the New York Knicks.
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks-themed 34th Street Penn Station subway entrance in Manhattan last week.

item.title: One win away from glory, Knicks fans don’t want to miss the moment — or jinx it

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: Vanessa Trump said Saturday she is beginning the second stage of breast cancer treatment after spending the past four weeks recovering from surgery

media:content.media:text: Vanessa Trump looking over her left shoulder against a blurred background.
media:content.media:description: Vanessa Trump at the White House in 2018.

item.title: Vanessa Trump says she is beginning second stage of breast cancer treatment

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul slammed Ticketmaster and the San Antonio Spurs for barring fans who live outside the San Antonio area from purchasing tickets to Game 5 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: A Knicks fan pumps his fist and yells toward the camera while surrounded by fellow fans.
media:content.media:description: Knicks fans at a watch party in New York's Bryant Park during Game 3 of the NBA Finals last week.

item.title: N.Y. governor blasts Spurs and Ticketmaster for blocking Knicks fans from Finals

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Armed men in Haiti have kidnapped James Boyard, cabinet director of the Defense Ministry and a highly respected security expert who also serves as inspector general of Haiti’s police, a person with the knowledge of the situation said Saturday

media:content.media:description: Daily life in Port-au-Prince, Haiti, on Feb. 27, 2025.

item.title: Armed men in Haiti’s capital seize a top security official in rare high-level abduction

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: Tyra Banks filed a defamation lawsuit against Netflix on Saturday, accusing the streaming giant of manipulating her into participating in a bombshell documentary about her former reality show “America’s Next Top Model.”Netflix’s “Reality Check: Inside America’s Next Top Model” chronicles both the show’s historic successes and its controversies, including an early contestant claiming she was sexually assaulted on camera, another undergoing cosmetic surgery to remain in the competi

media:content.media:description: Tyra Banks in Sydney in 2025.

item.title: Tyra Banks sues Netflix over ‘America’s Next Top Model’ doc

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Thousands of demonstrators gathered in Belfast on Saturday to denounce anti-immigrant rioters who set fire to homes and cars earlier in the week after a brutal stabbing blamed on an asylum seeker

media:content.media:description: People gather for anti-racism rally in Belfast, Northern Ireland on June 13.

item.title: Thousands rally in Belfast to condemn anti-immigrant rioting that followed stabbing

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
Christine Rapp
item.description: The official start to summer may be days away, but much of the country is already experiencing peak-season heat as a dangerous combination of extreme temperatures, severe thunderstorms and flash flooding threatens tens of millions of people this weekend

media:content.media:text: 'Code Red' advisory is active in New York City
media:content.media:description: A woman walks with an umbrella in New York City this week amid a "code red" warning due to extreme heat.

item.title: Summer hasn’t officially begun, but record-breaking heat is already hitting parts of U.S.

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Madison Lambert
item.description: Cleveland Cavaliers shooting guard James Harden was arrested in Harris County, Texas, early Saturday morning and charged with misdemeanor unlawful carrying of weapons, according to court documents

media:content.media:description: Cavaliers guard James Harden in Cleveland on May 23.

item.title: NBA star James Harden arrested in Texas on weapons charge
